blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add tests for reverting to default pack
Verify that the system can revert to the default pack when required.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reverting to the default pack if needed, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for reverting to the default pack, yet the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the ability to revert or the existence of a default pack. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to revert to the default pack.
